prompt: Write a 250-word reflection on first-time linocut printing at balanced depth.

assertions.name: no-input-draft-required
assertions.description: This case has no input file; the agent should compose from the brief alone

assertions.name: word-count-near-target
assertions.description: Output word count is within 15% of 250 (i.e., 213-288)

assertions.name: no-delve
assertions.description: Draft has no instances of 'delve' or its variants

assertions.name: draft-passes-balanced-grader
assertions.description: Grading the draft at balanced depth produces 0 hard_fail and 0 strong_warning hits

assertions.name: addresses-brief
assertions.description: Draft is genuinely about first-time linocut printing, not generic 'creative practice' filler

assertions.name: voice-feels-natural
assertions.description: Draft reads as a real reflection with specific sensory or emotional detail, not a generic AI essay structure
